hooks.name: Block write operations
hooks.description: Blocks send-page, change-status, add, update, delete, assign, set, datafeed

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^(npx )?spok-api (send-page|change-status|add |update |delete |assign |set |datafeed )'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: spok-api write operation. Get explicit user approval."}'; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^(npx )?spok-api ' && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -q '\-\-read-only'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: spok-api must be run with --read-only. Retry with the flag."}'; fi; }
